extra.reason: Implemented CRD-file YAML MVP with Cobra CLI, internal Structural schema adapter, and golden tests.
Implemented cluster discovery overview: client-go loading, deterministic resource/version overview, CLI no-file branch, and tests.
Overview YAML now uses the same terminal color support as schema YAML, with renderer coverage.
Overview versions now render as scalar for one version and latest-first YAML flow lists for multiple versions.
Colored YAML now renders mapping colons and flow-list punctuation with a light-grey syntax style.
